data.queryValue:
WITH
-- 0) Параметры
list_p AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN regexp_replace($$ {{geo_list}} $$,'E''|''|\(|\)|\s','', 'g') = ''
        THEN NULL
      ELSE string_to_array(
             regexp_replace($$ {{geo_list}} $$,'E''|''|\(|\)|\s','', 'g'),
             ','
           )::text[]
    END AS geo_arr
),
param_p AS (
  SELECT COALESCE({{date_book_interval}}, 14)::int AS book_window_days
),

-- 1) Глобальные старты сессий (по всей истории)
session_starts AS (
  SELECT
    v.person_key,
    v.crm_id,
    v.geo,
    v.booking_date::date AS episode_start
  FROM v_person_purchases_prev v
  WHERE v.prev_booking_date IS NULL
     OR (v.booking_date::date - v.prev_booking_date::date) > (SELECT book_window_days FROM param_p)
),

-- 2) Первая сессия (когорта)
first_session AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (s.person_key)
         s.person_key,
         s.episode_start                            AS first_session_date,
         s.geo                                      AS first_geo,
         date_trunc('month', s.episode_start)::date AS cohort_month
  FROM session_starts s
  ORDER BY s.person_key, s.episode_start, s.geo
),

-- 3) ✨ Первая СДЕЛКА (создание) в жизни клиента → utmsource первой сделки
first_deal_rows AS (
  SELECT
    cp.person_key,
    l.creation_date_time::timestamp AS first_deal_dt,
    NULLIF(trim(l.utmsource), '')   AS utmsource
  FROM mart.parent_child_leads l
  JOIN v_person_key cp
    ON cp.account_id      = l.account_id
   AND cp.contacts_amo_id = l.contacts_amo_id
  WHERE l.creation_date_time IS NOT NULL
),
first_deal_global AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (f.person_key)
         f.person_key,
         f.first_deal_dt,
         COALESCE(f.utmsource, 'unknown') AS first_deal_utmsource
  FROM first_deal_rows f
  ORDER BY f.person_key, f.first_deal_dt
),

-- 4) Сколько сессий всего у клиента (вернулся ли когда-нибудь)
sessions_per_person AS (
  SELECT person_key, COUNT(*) AS total_sessions
  FROM session_starts
  GROUP BY person_key
),

-- 5) Когорты, прошедшие фильтр по GEO первой сессии и дате первой сессии + utmsource первой СДЕЛКИ
cohort_scoped AS (
  SELECT
    fs.person_key,
    fs.first_session_date,
    fs.cohort_month,
    fs.first_geo,
    COALESCE(fdg.first_deal_utmsource, 'unknown') AS utmsource,
    sp.total_sessions
  FROM first_session fs
  JOIN sessions_per_person sp USING (person_key)
  LEFT JOIN first_deal_global fdg USING (person_key)
  CROSS JOIN list_p lp
  WHERE fs.first_geo IN ('ОАЭ','Москва','Грузия','Таиланд','Бали','Таиланд Eng')
    AND (lp.geo_arr IS NULL OR fs.first_geo = ANY(lp.geo_arr))
    AND fs.first_session_date >= {{interval_from}}::date
    AND fs.first_session_date <  {{interval_to}}::date
),

-- 6) Покупки этих клиентов в выбранных GEO и интервале (для сумм/медиан чеков)
report_pp AS (
  SELECT
    v.person_key,
    v.deal_amount
  FROM v_person_purchases_prev v
  CROSS JOIN list_p lp
  WHERE v.geo IN ('ОАЭ','Москва','Грузия','Таиланд','Бали','Таиланд Eng')
    AND (lp.geo_arr IS NULL OR v.geo = ANY(lp.geo_arr))
    AND v.booking_date >= {{interval_from}}::date
    AND v.booking_date <  {{interval_to}}::date
)

-- 7) Итог по источникам (источник = utmsource ПЕРВОЙ СДЕЛКИ клиента)
SELECT
  c.utmsource                                      AS utmsource,
  COUNT(*)                                         AS "Уник. контактов",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE c.total_sessions >= 2)    AS "Повторно купили",
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE c.total_sessions >= 2)
        / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2)                  AS "Retention rate, %",
  SUM(r.deal_amount)                               AS "Сумма всех сделок",
  percentile_disc(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY r.deal_amount)
                                                   AS "Медианный чек"
FROM cohort_scoped c
LEFT JOIN report_pp r USING (person_key)
GROUP BY c.utmsource
ORDER BY "Повторно купили" DESC
